caption:
Save this for your al fresco dates this winter season in Dubai!

🌳HAPI
📍Al Khazzan Park, opposite City Walk
🥞 What to have: sweet potato pancakes for breakfast, burgers, giant marshmallow
💵 Approximate bill for 2: 100 AED

🚤 Mazmi Cafe
📍Bur Dubai Souk, Old Dubai
🥪 What to have: All day breakfast, Italian and Arabic dishes
💵 Approximate bill for 2: 150 AED

💚 Wabi Sabi
📍Mirdif and Sharjah, Al Quoz Pond branch featured in this reel is closed.
🥗 What to have: plant-based dishes
💵 Approximate bill for 2: 150 AED

⛳️ Lakeview
📍 Dubai Creek Golf and Yacht Club
🍳 What to have: Full English Breakfast
💵 Approximate bill for 2: 200 AED

🌱 The Farm Restaurant 
📍Al Barari
🍕What to have: breakfast, artisan pizza
💵 Approximate bill for 2: 250 AED

Did I miss your fave winter date venue? Drop a recommendation in the comment section. 💕
